LightningComponentBundle.description: Shared node processing service module. Provides applyFilters (filters a flat node list against the current filter state), buildTypeCounts (produces MetadataType-to-count map from a node list), buildNodeMap (produces an Id-to-node Map for O(1) lookup), and extractTypes (returns sorted unique type list from nodes). No Apex calls, no UI, no state. Used by metaMapperResults, metaMapperGraph, and metaMapperTree.
